UART Controller

Absolute Address:
Base Offset:
0x0
Size:
0x28
Source:
reg_spec_ref.rdl

Description

UART controller with 8-bit data support, 32-bit register aliasing, and DLAB access control.

Contents

Offset Identifier Name
0x00 RBR_THR RBR_THR Register
0x04 DLL Divisor Latch LSB
0x08 DLM Divisor Latch MSB
0x0C LCR Line Control Register
0x10 IER Interrupt Enable Register
0x14 IIR Interrupt Identification Register
0x18 FCR FIFO Control Register
0x1C LSR Line Status Register
0x20 MCR Modem Control Register
0x24 MSR Modem Status Register
